payload.title: Hide done tickets in orphan (no-epic) swimlanes
payload.description: In the swimlanes-by-epic view, the 'Random Bugs' and '(no epic)' catch-all lanes show every status including done. For orphaned items, done usually means 'closed for good, no further work needed' — keeping them around is noise. Hide done tickets in those catch-all lanes specifically; epic lanes are unaffected (the Show-Done-Epics toggle already controls those).
